allow: PowerShell($tools = @{ "Node.js" = "node"; "npm" = "npm"; "Git" = "git"; "Docker" = "docker"; "FFmpeg" = "ffmpeg"; "Python" = "python"; "VS Code" = "code"; "pnpm" = "pnpm" }; foreach \($name in $tools.Keys\) { $cmd = Get-Command $tools[$name] -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { $v = ""; try { $v = & $tools[$name] --version 2>$null | Select-Object -First 1 } catch {}; Write-Output "$name : INSTALLED \($v\)" } else { Write-Output "$name : NOT FOUND" } })
PowerShell(npm install next-auth@beta bcryptjs zod; \(Get-Content package.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).dependencies)
